title: stelis chasmiphora
intro: Stelis chasmiphora is a type of orchid, a flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and coughs. The health benefits of Stelis chasmiphora include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
